chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR. Const. Petition No. S- 15 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025. Mr. Tanveer Abbass Shah, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG along with ASI Sain Bux of Police Station Kandiario. -.-.-.--.--.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for petitioners state that petitioner No.1 Mst. Noshaba after swearing free will has contracted marriage/nikkha with petitioner No.2 Sheraz Ali against the wishes of her parents and the private respondents who are relatives of petitioner No.1 have become annoyed and issuing threats of dire consequences. Learned counsel for the petitioners further submits that petitioners apprehend danger and threat to their lives hence proper protection may be provided to them. This Court vide order dated28.01.2025 issued notice to the respondents but they are called absent. Police officials present in Court state that due protection shall be provided to the petitioners. He is directed to obtain proper bond in the sum of Rs. 500,000/- each from the private respondents to the effect that no harm shall be caused to the petitioners. The petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Irfan/PA
